_schema.description: Cyclic categorical data — typically 12 months or similar equal-interval periods. Each segment gets an equal angular slice; value encodes the petal radius (and thus area, which grows as r²). Best for cyclic patterns where the circular metaphor adds interpretive meaning.

fields.title: string — chart headline
fields.segments[].label: string — category or period label (keep short, displayed radially)
fields.segments[].value: number — positive value encoded as petal radius

_schema.replace: Replace segments[] with your cyclic data. Any number of segments works; 8–16 is the practical readable range. The chart is honest about cyclic structure but distorts by area — use the area-correct toggle to see the difference.

title: AI Humanitarian Deployment Activity by Month
